---
created: "2026-04-10T00:00:00Z"
updated: "2026-04-09T10:00:00-06:00"
id: task-sv0-toolchain-milestone-3-checklist
key: sv0-toolchain-milestone-3-checklist
state: active
tags:
  - sv0
  - sv0-toolchain
  - milestone-3
  - self-hosting
title: "milestone 3: SML → sv0 transliteration checklist"
type: task
roadmap_parent: sv0-toolchain-roadmap-full
---

# milestone 3: transliteration checklist

## purpose

Track **bootstrap compiler** surface area in **`sv0c/sml/`** against **sv0 seeds** under **`sv0c/lib/`**, **`sv0c/lexer/`**, **`sv0c/parser/`**, and future phase directories. This file is a **living index**; it does **not** by itself close milestone 3 (see **`task/sv0-toolchain-milestone-3-self-host.Rmd`** for definition of done).

## how to use

- When a new **`.sv0`** seed lands, add or extend a row (or note it under **harness**).
- When a major **`sml/`** subtree is fully superseded by sv0 sources in-tree, mark the row **goal met** and point to the canonical sv0 paths.
- Keep **`lib/bootstrap-sources.list`**, **`lib/golden/stage0/*.c`**, and **`lib/self-host-sv0-loop.list`** aligned with whatever is **compiled and tested** today.

## configuration

/env: SV0TOOLCHAIN_ROOT=.
/env: SV0C_ROOT=sv0c

## compiler phase → status

| Phase / area | SML anchor (representative) | sv0 track (today) | Notes |
|--------------|----------------------------|-------------------|--------|
| Diagnostics, spans | `sml/error/*`, `sml/span*` | `lib/diagnostic_core.sv0`, `lib/diagnostic_batch_core.sv0`, `lib/span_core.sv0` | Stage0 goldens + bootstrap list |
| Lexer | `sml/lexer/*` | `lexer/token_*_core.sv0` | Keyword / delim / op bands aligned with parser seeds |
| Parser (expr / stmt / item) | `sml/parser/*` | `parser/*_core.sv0` | Pratt, assign, cast, type parse slices |
| Name resolution | `sml/env.sml`, resolver | `lib/env_core.sv0`, `lib/env_scope_core.sv0`, `lib/resolver_*_core.sv0`, `lib/lookup_*_core.sv0` | Merged lookup order in `lookup_value_core` |
| Types | `sml/types*` | `lib/type_alias_core.sv0`, `lib/lookup_type_core.sv0`, `lib/lookup_type_alias_core.sv0`, `lib/checker_mut_assign_core.sv0` | Canonical type / alias path; **`let mut`** assignment to **`x`** or one-level **`p.f`**, compound **`+=`** (arithmetic assign-ops), **E0448**/**E0449**/**E0450** |
| Lowering (IR) | `sml/lowering.sml` | `lib/lower_unop_core.sv0`, `lib/lower_lit_core.sv0`, `lib/lower_binop_core.sv0`, `lib/lower_assign_lhs_core.sv0`, `lib/lower_ast_ty_cstring_core.sv0`, `lib/lower_value_to_expr_core.sv0`, `lib/lower_ast_binop_to_c_core.sv0`, `lib/lower_expr_init_cty_core.sv0`, `lib/lower_match_scrut_cty_core.sv0`, `lib/lower_callee_ret_cty_core.sv0`, `lib/lower_enum_tag_core.sv0`, `lib/lower_struct_fields_core.sv0`, `lib/lower_resolve_fn_callee_core.sv0`, `lib/lower_resolve_enum_ctor_path_core.sv0`, `lib/lower_split_qname_core.sv0`, `lib/lower_enum_store_payload_core.sv0`, `lib/lower_find_variant_ast_core.sv0`, `lib/lower_ok_payload_cty_core.sv0`, `lib/lower_scan_lets_core.sv0`, `lib/lower_with_scrut_locals_core.sv0`, `lib/lower_mentions_result_core.sv0`, `lib/lower_ret_syntax_is_unit_core.sv0`, `lib/lower_old_slot_core.sv0`, `lib/lower_all_old_names_core.sv0`, `lib/lower_uniq_old_names_core.sv0`, `lib/lower_old_targets_core.sv0`, `lib/lower_old_instrs_core.sv0` | Unary + literal-kind + **Ir.Binop** + **`classifyAssignLhs`** + **`astTyToCString`** + **`valueToExpr`** + **`astBinopToC`** (C op width classes) + **`exprInitCty`** + **`matchScrutCty`** + **`calleeRetCty`** + **`enumTag`** + **`structFields`** + **`resolveFnCallee`** / **`resolveEnumCtorPath`** (import-alias path normalization harnesses) + **`splitQName`** (**`::`** segment-count harness) + **`enumStorePayload`** (**`p{i}`** / **`valueToExpr`** pairing harness) + **`findVariantAst`** (enum/variant AST hit + unit/tuple/struct shape tags) + **`okPayloadCty`** (**`Ok(T)`** tuple arity **1** + payload C-ty class) + **`scanLets`** (**`let`** binding → explicit **`astTyToCString`** vs inferred **`exprInitCty`**) + **`withScrutLocals`** (**`scrutLocals`** push/pop depth surrogate) + **`mentionsResult`** (**`ExprPath(["result"])`** + bounded **`expr_shape_tag`** OR harness) + **`retSyntaxIsUnit`** / **`useRetSlot`** (**`TyUnit`** / **`TyName(["unit"])`** vs other + **`ensures`** mentions surrogate) + **`oldSlot`** (**`_sv0old_`^`x`** length **8+|x|** surrogate) + **`allOldNames`** (**`old(x)`** count + **`expr_shape_tag`** recursive sum surrogate) + **`uniqOldNames`** (**`uon_acc_has`** dedup, **`in_len`** **≤4** length surrogate) + **`oldTargets`** (**`PatBind`** + **`oldMentions`** **`ot_mentions_has`**, **`param_len`** **≤4**) + **`oldInstrs`** (**2** IR instrs per **`oldTargets`** hit, **`int`** vs **`DeclNamed`**) slices; in SML today: **`Store`/`StoreField`**, compound assign via **`Binop` + `VMember`**; rest in SML |
| Link | `sml/link/link.sml` | `lib/link_strip_core.sv0` | **`stripLinkDirectives`** filter; full linker still SML |
| IR → VM encoder | `sml/backend/vm/vm_codegen.sml` | SML (authoritative today) | **`VAddrOf`** → local **slot** **`i32`**; **`sv0_no_alias`** → **`CALL_BUILTIN` 1** in **sv0vm**; C parity unchanged |
| C backend | `sml/backend/c/*` | SML | **Feature parity** and **native self-host** still open |
| Contract runtime / VM | `sml/*` | Partial (analyzer still SML) | **`requires`/`ensures`** with **`forall`/`exists`** run on VM (**vm-parity** **`forall_requires`**, **`exists_requires`**); **`no_alias` / `VAddrOf`** on VM; remaining work is **contract analyzer** transliteration and any future clause forms |

## harness (already in CI)

| Mechanism | Role |
|-----------|------|
| **`./scripts/sv0 bootstrap-build`** | Every path in **`lib/bootstrap-sources.list`** builds (C + VM artifacts as configured). |
| **`lib/golden/stage0/*.c`** | Reference C for listed seeds vs SML emit. |
| **`./scripts/sv0 self-host-sv0-loop`** | Pilot **`lib/self-host-sv0-loop.list`**: SML→C×2, **`cc`**+run; optional **`SV0_SELF_HOST_COMPILER`** diff. |
| **`sv0c/test/vm-parity/`** | SML bytecode goldens; manifest paths must ⊆ **`bootstrap-sources.list`** (meta **`verify_vm_parity_manifest_bootstrap.py`**). |
| **`sv0c/examples/learn/*.sv0`** (and nested dirs) | Informal tutorials (**not** on bootstrap/vm-parity lists); teach **`vm-compile`** / **`vm-project-compile`** / **`vm-run`** / **`emit-c`**. |
| **`sv0c/examples/libs/*/`** | **Educational library-shaped** packages (`edu_clamp`, `edu_bits`, …) + Markdown; **not** bootstrap seeds; **`vm-project-compile`** per package root. |

## related

- `task/sv0-toolchain-milestone-3-self-host.Rmd` — stakeholder bar, phases, refinement log
- `sv0c/lib/LAYOUT.md` — directory layout and commands
- `sv0c/doc/transliteration-plan.md` — full SML→sv0 inventory and sequencing (milestone 3)
- `sv0c/doc/self-host-sv0-loop.md` — self-host pilot recipe
